reviews.comment:
Como confitería al paso esta bien. Variedad de productos y bebidas. Buena la higiene. Aunque es autoservicio , buena atención de las cajeras.

(Translated by Google)
As a quick-service confectionery shop, it's fine. A variety of products and drinks. Good hygiene. Although it's self-service, the cashiers are helpful.
